level.title: Train Your Minion
level.subdescription: Your Minion is smart but generic. They give the same kind of answer to everyone. Time to change that. A Custom GPT is a specialist version of ChatGPT trained to do one specific job your way, every time, for anyone on your team.

mission_targets: Create your own Custom GPT called 1inMINION Project Manager
Load it with specialist instructions so it behaves differently from regular ChatGPT
Run your Level 2 mission debrief through it and receive a structured HTML project plan

mission_gear.name: Custom GPTs
mission_gear.definition: A Custom GPT is a version of ChatGPT configured with specific instructions, personality, and behavior for one type of task. It works the same way every time regardless of who uses it.
mission_gear.theme_translation: Think of it as sending your Minion to specialist school. A regular Minion tries everything. A trained specialist Minion does one thing brilliantly, consistently, every single mission.
why_useful: Same quality output every time, no matter who runs it
Shareable across your whole team, not just you
Works across any project, not locked to one context
You build it once and reuse it forever

mission_check: I opened Explore GPTs and clicked + Create
I switched to the Configure tab and added the name, description, and instructions
I enabled all capabilities including Code Interpreter and Web Search
I saved my Custom GPT and clicked View GPT
I uploaded my Level 2 mission debrief .txt file into the GPT
My Custom GPT generated an HTML project plan with risks, a quick win, and a checklist
